title: dryopteris lagerheimii
intro: Dryopteris lagerheimii is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris lagerheimii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Dryopteris lagerheimii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
